name: Haizakura
description: __Height__: 138 cm __Character Designer__: [Na-Ga](https://anilist.co/staff/102754/NaGa) Haizakura is a waitress doll working at Kuronekotei cafe. She is a clumsy girl that knows little to nothing about society due to having been reset once before.
mediaTitles: Prima Doll: Youkoso Kuro Nekotei e

name: Hanako
description: Hanako is the adopted dog of the Inuyashiki Family.

name: Haseo
description: Class: Adept Rogue (MultiWeapon in Japanese) Real Name: Ryou Misaki Avatar: The Terror of Death, Skeith Height: 174cm In .hack//Roots, Haseo is a newbie player to the Online game known as The World. He is an outcast in real life, and not very good at dealing with people. Upon logging into The World R:2, Haseo is attacked by PKs, (Player Killers), and rescued by Ovan, the Guild master of the Twilight Brigade. Haseo then joins the Twilight Brigade in order to learn more about Ovan. Eventually, aft

name: Hige
description: Hige seems to know how to function the best in human society, even wearing a dog collar, although the true meaning behind his collar is revealed later in the series that is a tag/transmitter . He tends to use his intuition more than the others, but only when he's not thinking with his stomach instead. Hige is quite the ladies' man and is always on the look-out for a nice girl. He has the best sense of smell between the others. Hige seems to be a Mexican wolf in the series. (Source: Wikipedia) Hi

name: Hina Tsurugi
mediaTitles: Diary of Our Days at the Breakwater
searchTerms: Diary of Our Days at the Breakwater

name: Hrist
description: __Species__: Demigod Hrist is the second of the 13 Valkyrie sisters. ~!She forms a Völundr with [Kojirou Sasaki](https://anilist.co/character/140646/Kojirou-Sasaki) during the third round of Ragnarok.!~

name: Hyura
description: Hyura is the current First Brigade Leader of Tooru Castle. She was one of the final four contestants for the next Demon King to replace Tooru. (Source: helck.fandom.com)

name: Indra Ootsutsuki
description: Indra Ootsutsuki‎ was the first born son of Hagoromo Ootsutsuki. He was initially thought to be the most suitable successor of his father's teachings, however, it was his younger brother Asura that ended up inheriting this mantle — a decision that would lead the two brothers to fight against each other. Indra is also credited with being the creator of ninjutsu, and the progenitor of the Uchiha clan.

name: Inei Houzouin
description: An elderly Buddhist monk, Houzouin Inei is the retired founder of the Houzouin spear technique. Quirky and wise by nature, Inei helps and trains Miyamoto Musashi in order to give Inshun -- the second-generation master of the Hōzōin spear technique -- the valuable experience of mortal combat.

name: Ivan
description: A boy born and raised in the slums. Ivan was sold off by his father due to his crippling debt. Ivan soon became obsessed with money, believing his family could become whole once more if he simply had enough money. Due to his father’s poor habit of drinking till he passed out, Ivan happened to pick up the same drinking problem.

name: Izumu Niounomiya
description: The strongest hitman of the Niounomiya Troupe. He is the split personality and older brother of Rizumu Niounomiya. Though he identifies as a male, his actual body is that of a female due to him being a split personality. ~!In reality, Izumu is his very own person, rather than a split personality. He is typically near his younger sister, Rizumu Niounomiya, though he stays out of sight, only coming out when necessary. Like other Niounomiya, he is the product of a lab experiment to make the stronge
mediaTitles: Hitokui Magical: Satsuriku Kijutsu no Niounomiya Kyoudai
searchTerms: Hitokui Magical: Satsuriku Kijutsu no Niounomiya Kyoudai

name: Jae-Hyeok Kim
description: Manny Kim is the 'alpha' of his school, being quite popular with everyone. ~!That changed when an accident took his legs.!~ He comes from a rich family, gets good grades, and is quite good at fighting. He and Jin Seon have a very complicated relationship.

name: Kanami Kurosaki
description: Yaeka's aunt. Runs a restaurant called Kurosaki. Not intimidated by her brother-in-law Kazuhiko or Kirishima, she talks to all on equal footing. Her hobbies include dressing up Yaeka and Kirishima.

name: Kazunari Usa
description: Usa Kazunari is a high school freshman whose parents had to move away for work. He agrees to stay anywhere, as long as he could live on his own in peace and quiet. Having grown up surrounded by his parents' eccentric friends, Usa feels that unique individuals tend to gravitate to him resulting in what he considers a disastrous three years in middle school where he gained a reputation for handling odd people. Although he initially balks at the idea of rooming with dysfunctional people, he decides
mediaTitles: The Kawai Complex Guide to Manors and Hostel Behavior
The Kawai Complex Guide to Manors and Hostel Behavior: First Time
The Kawai Complex Guide to Manors and Hostel Behavior

name: Kohzou Fuyutsuki
description: Kozo Fuyutsuki is second-in-command of NERV HQ and Gendo Ikari's right hand man. As Deputy Commander of NERV, Fuyutsuki frequently takes command of situations at the base whenever Gendo is away on business. Gendo also tends to unload the more mundane work, such as town council meetings, paperwork, and the like, onto Fuyutsuki.
mediaTitles: Neon Genesis Evangelion: The End of Evangelion
searchTerms: Neon Genesis Evangelion: The End of Evangelion

name: Kojirou Kanemaki
description: Kojiro Kanemaki is the deuteragonist of the manga Orient. He is the childhood best friend of Musashi and the captain of the Kanemaki Bushi. His and Musashi's goal is to form the greatest Bushi ever.

name: Kuesu Jinguuji
description: Kuesu is a daughter of another demon-slaying family, who seek to ally themselves with the Amakawa family through marriage. She appears to be part of Yuuto's past and claims that Yuuto's grandfather had promised their marriage. She is highly aggressive and assertive, going so far as to kiss Yuuto twice in front of Himari just to stake her claim. Unlike Yuuto, she is trained in her heritage and is fully capable of fighting. The Jinguuji family is seen by the 10 other families as heretics for using

name: Kukui Hakase
description: Professor Kukui is a major supporting character of the Pokémon anime in the Sun & Moon series. He is a Pokémon Professor in the Alola region and a teacher at the Pokémon School on Melemele Island. He is also the true identity of The Masked Royal. (Source: Bulbapedia)

name: Kuro
description: Kuro is a girl dressed in black who carries a coffin wherever she goes. Her name is not really Kuro, and when meeting other people on her journey, she claims to be a traveler. Because of her appearance, she has been mistaken for a vampire, a mortician, and a boy, among other things.
mediaTitles: Shoulder-a-Coffin Kuro Side Story: Nostalgic Travelogue
searchTerms: Shoulder-a-Coffin Kuro Side Story: Nostalgic Travelogue

name: Kurumi Shiratori
description: Shiratori Kurumi is the VJ for the group __[Lyrical Lily](https://anilist.co/staff/294424/Lyrical-Lily)__. With a cheerful personality, Kurumi loves fun things. Bored of being in a strict school for children of rich and prestigious families, Kurumi is always looking for ways to work some kind of mischief. Although she is grateful to Miyu for helping her out of trouble and Kurumi feels like she owes a lot to her, she has no intention of stopping her antics. (Source: D4DJ Fandom Wiki)

name: Kuzuha
description: __Height:__ 178cm __Debut date:__ Mar 8, 2018 (Independent), Jul 30, 2018 (Nijisanji) __Affiliation:__ Nijisanji (formerly independent) __Illustrator & Character Designer:__ Loalo Honda ([Twitter](https://twitter.com/v_loAlo)) __[Profile](https://nijisanji.ichikara.co.jp/member/kuzuha/) | [Website](https://vamp-kuzuha.jimdofree.com/) | [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCSFCh5NL4qXrAy9u-u2lX3g) | [bilibili](https://space.bilibili.com/434563422) | [Twitter](https://twitter.com/Vamp_Kuzu)

name: Kyouko Shirafuji
description: Kyouko is the manager of Wagnaria. She usually maintains a rather apathetic attitude about how the restaurant is run and almost never bothers to do any work herself. She is not beyond using violence to deal with unruly customers and firmly believes that employees come before the customers, as the employees are the ones doing all the work. She is 28 years old, but she becomes despondent whenever her age is mentioned. Kyouko saved Yachiyo as a little girl from bullies, which is how they met. (Sour

name: Kyros Granado
description: Kyros is the only son of the millionaire Duke Granado, and through his own efforts, he achieved the rank of Earl. Although women all over the country have their eyes on him, he dislikes nobles and their social circles, and is tired of marriage proposals. He fell in love with Marie at their first meeting.

name: Lucie Menelumia
nativeName: ルーシェ・メネルミア
description: __Height:__ 162cm An elf who has spent her life surrounded by birds and flowers, and thus has a kind personality and a gentle soul, because of this she is troubled over the dispute between the elves and dark elves. She accepts the protagonist right away and enjoys hearing his stories of the human world, as her hobbies include reading and researching ancient documents.
mediaTitles: Welcome to the SUKEBE ELF Forest
searchTerms: ルーシェ・メネルミア
